new_terms.context: The temperature of the coolant as it enters the compute tray or rack.
Mechanical compressor-based cooling equipment used in datacenters.
A system used to manage coolant distribution and heat exchange between loops.
The temperature difference between the supply and return coolant.
A cooling system design that uses ambient air to reduce or eliminate chiller use.
The pressure gain provided by a pump within the hydraulic cooling path.
The secondary cooling loop that circulates coolant directly to the IT equipment.
